name: Gannett Co., Inc.
description: Gannett Co., Inc. is a subscription-led and digitally-focused media and marketing solutions company. It is the largest U.S. newspaper publisher by daily circulation, with a portfolio that includes the flagship publication USA TODAY, along with hundreds of local media outlets across 43 states and Guam, as well as Newsquest in the United Kingdom. Gannett also operates a digital marketing services business under the LocaliQ brand and hosts numerous national and local events.
